channel.title: Latest Science News -- ScienceDaily
channel.description: Breaking science news and articles on global warming, extrasolar planets, stem cells, bird flu, autism, nanotechnology, dinosaurs, evolution -- the latest discoveries in astronomy, anthropology, biology, chemistry, climate and environment, computers, engineering, health and medicine, math, physics, psychology, technology, and more.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 ScienceDaily or by other parties, where indicated.

item.title: Researchers map the brain circuit behind chronic pain
item.description: Scientists have identified a specific neural circuit that amplifies the perception of chronic pain in laboratory models. By selectively silencing the circuit, the team reduced pain-related behavior without dulling normal touch sensation, pointing toward targeted therapies that could spare patients the sedation and dependency risks of current painkillers.

item.title: New catalyst turns captured carbon dioxide into jet fuel
item.description: A copper-based catalyst converts captured carbon dioxide directly into long-chain hydrocarbons suitable for aviation fuel, the researchers report. Running on renewable electricity, the single-step process reached efficiencies that earlier multi-stage routes could not, raising the prospect of carbon-neutral flight if the catalyst proves durable at industrial scale.

item.title: Distant exoplanet shows signs of a water-rich atmosphere
item.description: Observations of a sub-Neptune world orbiting a nearby red dwarf reveal spectral features consistent with abundant water vapor, astronomers say. The detection, if confirmed by follow-up observations, would make the planet one of the most promising targets yet in the search for habitable conditions beyond the solar system.
